/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/TrafficSimulation.dir/main.cpp.o -o TrafficSimulation  libsimcore.a _deps/imgui-sfml-build/libImGui-SFML.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so
